page_content: CMSC106 Introduction to C Programming (4 Credits) Design and analysis of programs in C. An introduction to computing using structured programming concepts. Intended for students with no or minimal programming experience. Prerequisite: MATH115. Restriction: Must not be in Computer Science program; and must not have completed any courses from CMSC131-499 course range. Credit Only Granted for: CMSC106 or CMSC122.
